title: Query logic concentrated in a 937-line store.rs module
evidence: src/store.rs is 937 lines (all 9 query fns + result types + unit tests); maintainability=0.3248 from scores.json
suggestion: Split store.rs into per-concern modules (matches, teams, standings, players) to improve maintainability without changing behavior

title: FIFA dataset lacks major Brazilian club rosters, so club-filtered player queries can return empty
evidence: README.md documents that fifa_data.csv has no Flamengo/Corinthians/Palmeiras/São Paulo club rows; search_players club filter (server.rs:327) is implemented but yields empty for those clubs
suggestion: None required — capability is implemented; this is a provided-data limitation, correctly documented rather than a defect

title: Server exposes 9 tools, exceeding the required query set
evidence: server.rs registers list_teams and list_competitions discovery helpers in addition to the spec's match/team/player/competition/stats tools
suggestion: None — surfaced as an enhancement beyond spec, not a deduction
